name: GraniteShares 3x Short FATANG Daily ETC
summary: GraniteShares 3x Short FATANG Daily ETC is an exchange-traded commodity (ETC) that aims to deliver three times the inverse of the daily performance of a portfolio of stocks, including Facebook (Meta), Amazon, Tesla, Apple, Netflix, and Google (Alphabet). This leveraged ETC is designed for sophisticated investors seeking to profit from short-term declines in the value of these major technology companies. It is managed by GraniteShares and is based in London.
